name: claude-stack
description: A complete coding-assist harness for Claude Code: setup skills (bootstrap/adopt the tuning stack), a constitution-gated spec-driven feature loop (brainstorm, specify, clarify, plan, tasks, analyze, implement), engineering discipline (tdd, debug, verify-done, finish-branch), a 13-dimension production-readiness audit, and a SessionStart routing hook. 17 skills; distilled from github/spec-kit and obra/superpowers (MIT, attributed).
